logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Framework version to 6.1.x to align with Spring Boot 3.3 and Java 21 support.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.3 requires Spring Framework 6.1.x; using the old 6.0.x version causes dependency resolution conflicts or runtime incompatibilities.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.x to support Java 21 and modernize the framework stack.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.1.x does not fully support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required for compatibility with the new JDK.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 21 or lack support for the 'release' flag behavior expected in modern builds.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and the API is intended to be replaced by getFirst().
